name: animated-html-tutorial
description: HTML5 canvas-based animated tutorials and help documentation for any web app
author: prystopia

scripts.build-prod: tsc -p src/tsconfig.json && esbuild src/animated-tutorial.ts --bundle --minify --keep-names --format=cjs --outfile=dist/animated-tutorial.js && esbuild src/browser-entry.ts --bundle --minify --keep-names --format=iife --outfile=dist/dist.js
